source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: Tootch-Wu-Wu Lucy, native girl from Hoonah, 1907
description: 1907 studio portrait photograph of a young Huna Tlingit woman named Tootch-Wu-Wu Lucy, wrapped in a traditional fur robe. Published by Case & Draper of Seattle. A rare intimate portrait from Huna Tlingit life at the turn of the 20th century.
alt: 1907 sepia studio portrait of a Huna Tlingit woman named Tootch-Wu-Wu Lucy wrapped in a fur robe
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov storage-services (ds 14387) and visually confirmed
